rulings.Case Title: HIGH POINT FINANCE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. VIOLIE D. PASTOR, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 6, 2024 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT TA & TO HOLDINGS, L.P. DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Cross-Complainant presented arguments and authorities regarding the extension of the statute of limitations. Cross-Defendant filed no reply. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ROSA ISELA FRANCO VS. CASEY MCLOED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 6, 2024 line 2. PLPLAINTIFF ROSA FRANCO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. In addition to the October 14, 2024 proof of service addresses in the tentative ruling on the Motion to Enforce, there is an incomplete POS attached to the Notice of Motion. rulings.Case Title: ROSA ISELA FRANCO VS. CASEY MCLOED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 6, 2024 line 2. AINTIFF ROSA FRANCO MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. POS filed on October 14, 2024 attests to purported service on "Side Inc i/c/o Mcleod" as 580 4th Street. There is no proof of service for any other defendant and this address is not an address of record for any of the defendants. Furthermore, there is no proper Notice of Motion on file. The document so titled contains a declaration and no actual Notice. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JOSH ANDERSON VS. AMY BEASOM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint, Declaration Of Steven C. Sanders In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 6, 2024 line 5. PLAINTIFF JOSH ANDERSON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DECLARATION OF STEVEN C. SANDERS IN SUPPORT THEREOF; [PROPOSED] ORDER is GRANTED. Plaintiff to file and serve its amendment complaint no later than December 9, 2024. The Court notes that Plaintiff filed discovery motions and set them for hearing in Department 501 in violation of SFLR 8.10. Improperly set hearings are ordered off calendar. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: JASON VISCARRA VS. ELLEN POON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 6, 2024 line 7. DEFENDANT ELLEN POON MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is OFF CALENDAR. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith as required by CCP 439. Parties shall meet and confer in-person or over the phone at a mutually agreed upon time between December 9 and December 20, 2024. If parties cannot agree, parties shall meet and confer on December 11, 2024 at 1:30 p.m. If necessary after good faith meet and confer efforts, Defendant may file a demurrer no later than December 24, 2024. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
